title: lwc-debugger inputs
description: Typed inputs for the lwc-debugger runtime agent. Machine-readable mirror of the Inputs table in AGENT.md. The harness validates caller-supplied input packets against this schema before the agent begins work; validation failures surface the offending field to the caller rather than failing mid-run.

bundle_path.description: Required. Absolute or repo-relative path to the failing LWC bundle directory.

symptom.description: Required. Free-text description of the observed failure — what the user saw, when, and in which context.
symptom.example: Record page tile renders blank with no console error, but wire payload logs correctly in handleRecord.

error_text.description: Optional. Stack trace, ShowToastEvent body, console.error line, Lightning Inspector event payload, or HAR excerpt that accompanied the symptom.
error_text.example: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'value') at accountDetail.js:42

reproduction_context.description: Optional. Where the failure reproduces. Narrows hypothesis space.

recently_changed.description: Optional. Path(s) or commit SHA(s) of the most recent edits to the bundle — bias the hypothesis list toward files the user touched last.

allow_transient_edits.description: Optional. If true, the agent may propose temporary console.log / debugger; instrumentation as a separate Diagnostic Probe block. Transient probes are always paste-and-revert — the agent never writes to disk.
